hero.title: The power on your side for India's MSMEs
hero.subtitle: Prayaan Capital Private Limited was incorporated on 10 December 2018 and granted the NBFC Certificate of Registration by RBI on 6 June 2019, with our Registered and Corporate Office in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The word Prayaan, meaning "Journey", was conceptualised by the founders to reflect our intent of co-travelling with our customers on their entrepreneurial journey.

items.title: Where we want to be
items.desc: To meet the vast unmet needs of micro & small businesses through highly digitized channels of sourcing, accepting and deeper engagement.

items.title: The missing middle of MSME credit
items.desc: We serve MSMEs in manufacturing, trading and services — small to medium-sized stores, traders and manufacturing units in the segment that microfinance companies cannot fund and banks find too small. A combination of collateral value and our credit tools is used to decide the ideal loan amount for your business.

items.title: Customer First
items.desc: Door-step service with the right mix of products designed around the borrower's needs.

items.title: Technology Driven
items.desc: User-friendly app-based solutions backed by a strong technology-enabled backend for our customers.

items.title: Financial Inclusion
items.desc: We service small business customers, enabling them to grow and become more actively involved in the mainstream banking system.

items.title: Quick Turn-around
items.desc: Fast credit decisions and minimal paperwork so businesses can focus on what they do best.

items.title: Fair Credit Analysis
items.desc: Transparent assessment combining ground-level understanding of MSMEs with modern credit tools.

items.title: Regulatory Excellence
items.desc: RBI-registered NBFC committed to compliance, sound governance and customer protection.

heading.title: Building the Future of MSME Lending

items.event: Prayaan Capital Private Limited incorporated on 10 December 2018 in Chennai
Granted NBFC Certificate of Registration by RBI on 6 June 2019 (non-deposit taking)
Raised a US$1.2M seed round led by Accion Venture Lab and scaled secured lending to micro and small enterprises
Deepened property-backed business lending to manufacturing, trading and services MSMEs across Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh and Telangana
Rangarajan Krishnan, former MD & CEO of Five Star Business Finance, acquired a controlling stake and became Managing Director; raised a ₹110 Cr Series A led by Peak XV Partners to deepen MSME lending
